biography: Nabhaan Rizwan is a British actor known for his work in film and television. He gained prominence for his role as Raza Shar in the British drama series "Informer" (2018). Rizwan's compelling performance in the series garnered attention and critical acclaim. Additionally, he has appeared in various other projects, including "Station Eleven," showcasing his talent and versatility as an actor. Rizwan continues to make strides in the entertainment industry, establishing himself as a promising talent to watch.
name: Nabhaan Rizwan
